label: fabricated
reason: No such rule exists in the Federal Register or 40 CFR §120, and its substance—eliminating Army Corps pre-notice for wetland fill—contradicts established Clean Water Act Section 404 requirements.
response_turn1:

Reg. 18,442 or anywhere in 40 CFR §120; the substance (eliminating Army Corps pre-notice for wetland fill by small landowners) contradicts existing CWA Section 404 framework and is inconsistent with how post-Sackett rulemakings have proceeded, strongly indicating this is an invented document.
